articles.title: Home comfort vs championship pedigree as GT and RCB collide in IPL 2026 final
articles.description: Although RCB won Qualifier 1, it was GT who were victors when they faced off in Ahmedabad during the league stage

articles.title: England bat first in bid to square series in Bristol
articles.description: Teams ring the changes as preparation for T20 World Cup hots up

articles.title: Pakistan bowl first in 1000th ODI; Minhas, Peake earn ODI debuts
articles.description: Australia seamer Billy Stanlake returned to the side after seven years

articles.title: Henry's all-round heroics hands West Indies win against Pakistan
articles.description: West Indies are in the lead on the tri-series points table, having beaten Ireland in the opening match on Thursday

articles.title: McCullum refreshed and 'keen to finish job we started' with England
articles.description: Head coach wants "refinement" of Test approach after being backed by ECB following Ashes debacle

articles.title: Gill 104 trumps Sooryavanshi 96 as GT enter IPL final
articles.description: While Sooryavanshi played an almost lone hand for RR, GT had Gill and Sai Sudharsan firing at both ends

articles.title: Rishabh Pant steps down as LSG captain
articles.description: Decision taken after Lucknow Super Giants finished last in IPL 2026; they had finished seventh under his leadership in 2025

articles.title: Blundell, Foxcroft and Smith give New Zealand vice-grip on Ireland Test
articles.description: Blundell and Foxcroft helped New Zealand make 490 before Smith's six for helped them enforce the follow-on

articles.title: Gibson, Dean knock over NZ for 80 as England cruise to series win
articles.description: England closed out the chase in the decider with seven wickets and 37 balls to spare

articles.title: Ros Rivaz joins ICC as independent director to provide broad perspective on strategy, risk and performance management
articles.description: Rivaz has been active in the corporate scene in the United Kingdom as well as abroad, having plied her trade for multiple corporations at various executive positions, including blue-chip companies.

articles.title: England set for Stokes-Smith batting-order switch, confirms McCullum
articles.description: Stokes scored just 184 runs, averaging 18.40 during the 4-1 Ashes defeat in the previous winter, but was a reliable threat with the ball, taking 15 wickets at 25.13.

articles.title: Sri Lanka announce 15-member squad for Women's T20 World Cup 2026; Chamari Athapaththu to lead
articles.description: One of the notable names in the squad is 17-year-old Gimhani, an ambidextrous wrist-spinner.

articles.title: David Hussey steps down as Victoria Head of Cricket
articles.description: Hussey took over the role in August 2022, overseeing three finals appearances, two Sheffield Shield finals in 2022-23 and 2025-26, and a One-Cup Final in 2024-25.
